commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Dutch (`nl`) to the app language picker and adds Dutch localization strings plus language-picker labels across existing locale files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a current-main bug; current main does not have Dutch support. The PR defect is source-reproducible from the added Dutch strings file at line 936, where unescaped quotes make the entry malformed.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed to fix the malformed strings entry and add real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair or merge while proof is missing.
